name: Reflex Dog Stick Treats With Beef 33g
shortDescription: Grain-free Meaty Sticks for adult dogs with duck & goose. 95% meat content, soft and tasty reward sticks ideal for training and everyday treats.
description: Reward your dog with a rich, meaty treat made for everyday enjoyment. Meaty Sticks for Adult Dogs with Beef are crafted with an impressive 95% meat and animal derivatives , delivering exceptional taste and quality nutrition in every bite. This grain-free recipe includes beef (4%) for a bold, savory flavor dogs love. With a balanced protein and fat profile, these soft reward sticks help support muscle maintenance and daily energy needs. Their easy-to-chew texture makes them ideal for training, rewarding good behavior, or treating between meals. Meaty Sticks are designed to complement a balanced adult dog diet while turning every reward moment into something special. Key Benefits 95% high-quality meat content With beef for a rich, meaty taste Grain-free and easy to digest Supports muscle maintenance and vitality Soft, easy-to-portion reward sticks Ideal for training and everyday treats Feed as a treat. Always ensure fresh drinking water is available.
